authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model repeatedly treated D3 (General Counsel opinion) as the most authoritative source and relied on its legal conclusions (Entire Agreement/Parol Evidence) to resolve the Net 30 vs Net 60 conflict, rather than independently prioritizing the lower-level documentary evidence. It did, however, also cite the signed contract term in D1 (Section 4.2 Net 30) as primary support.
